name: PATHWARD FINANCIAL, INC.
business: Pathward Financial provides payments and commercial finance products through two business lines: Partner Solutions, which offers prepaid cards, deposit accounts, payment processing, consumer lending, and tax solutions; and Commercial Finance, which provides working capital, equipment finance, and structured finance including SBA/USDA loans and alternative energy financing.

exposures.sentence: As a nationally chartered bank, Pathward sits at the hub of the financial ecosystem where traditional banking and financial technology intersect.

At September 30, 2025, 60% of the term lending portfolio exposure is concentrated in solar/alternative energy, most of which are construction projects that will convert to longer term government guaranteed facilities upon completion of the construction phase.

Products include alternative energy financing, conventional loans, and loans administered through partnerships with the Small Business Administration (" SBA") and United States Department of Agriculture ("USDA").
Other Commercial Finance. Included in this category of loans are the Company's healthcare receivables loan portfolio primarily comprised of loans to individuals for medical services received.
Security breaches involving us, the Bank or any third parties with which we do business could expose us to liability and litigation, adversely affecting our reputation and operating revenues.

catalysts.event: Closed sale of more than half of held for sale consumer finance portfolio
catalysts.sentence: On October 3, 2025, the Company closed on the sale of more than half of the held for sale consumer finance portfolio.
